input_validation.description: MCP tools validate required parameters and reject invalid inputs
input_validation.evidence: All MCP tools return error JSON for invalid args (tested in Week 2)

output_moderation.description: All agent outputs are structured JSON, parsed and validated before use
output_moderation.evidence: LLM outputs parsed with json.loads() with fallback to rule-based decisions

rate_limiting.description: Agents have max_iterations limits to prevent runaway behavior

risk_classification.description: All MCP infrastructure actions tagged as safe/risky/dangerous
risk_classification.evidence: InfraMCP returns risk_level in every response, Strategist routes by risk

human_approval_gate.description: Risky and dangerous actions require human approval via /api/approve endpoint
human_approval_gate.evidence: FastAPI approval endpoints tested, pending actions tracked

kill_switch.description: LangGraph graphs can be interrupted by not calling ainvoke, CrewAI has max_iter
kill_switch.evidence: Graph-based architecture allows stopping at any node

audit_logging.description: Every MCP tool call, agent decision, and approval recorded in PostgreSQL
audit_logging.evidence: 9+ rows in agent_decisions table, audit_logs for every tool call

fallback_behavior.description: All agents have rule-based fallback if LLM fails
fallback_behavior.evidence: Watcher, Diagnostician, Strategist all have try/except with fallback logic
